title: First Rescue
intendedTensionBeat: Water exists but is forgiving; the dock is visible but not yet harsh.
intendedReleaseBeat: First clear target progress and first puppy extraction.
expectedPath: Clear route-supporting groups near the puppy, see target progress, open the rescue lane, and extract before water becomes threatening.
expectedFailMode: Player chases easy side groups and creates dock pressure instead of opening the rescue route.
designNotes: This level must sell the emotional premise before it feels like abstract clearing.
